zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Paunceforte於大約1410年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Paunceforte43歲，母親Lady Alice Margaret Herle28歲。他於1430年6月26日之前與Margaret Wogan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1492年之後在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Paunceforte于大约1410年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John Paunceforte43岁，母亲Lady Alice Margaret Herle28岁。他于1430年6月26日之前与Margaret Wogan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1492年之后在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Paunceforte was born about 1410, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir John Paunceforte, was 43 and his mother, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, was 28. He married Margaret Wogan before 26 June 1430. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1492, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Paunceforte est né environ 1410, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paunceforte, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wogan avant 26 juin 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1492, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Paunceforte um 1410 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paunceforte 43 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Margaret Herle 28. Er hat vor 26. Juni 1430 Margaret Wogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1492 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Paunceforte è nato il circa 1410 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Paunceforte, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Wogan prima del 26 giugno 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1492, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Paunceforteが約1410年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Paunceforteは43歳，母Lady Alice Margaret Herleは28歳であった。1430年6月26日以前にMargaret Woganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1492年以後にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Paunceforte(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paunceforte(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Margaret Herle(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1430년 6월 26일 이전 Margaret Wogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1492년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Paunceforte nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paunceforte, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wogan antes 26 de junho de 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1492, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Paunceforte родился около 1410 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paunceforte было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Margaret Herle, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wogan перед 26 июнь 1430 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1492 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия.

sm.about 1410–after 1492: e tusa o le 1410–ina ua ma'ea le 1492

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Paunceforte nació aproximadamente 1410, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Paunceforte, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Margaret Herle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret Wogan antes de 26 de junio de 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1492, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
